Your Roof.

Your Peace of Mind.

Snewroof gives you a dedicated customer portal to schedule inspections, review quotes, track projects, manage invoices, and communicate with your roofing team — all in one beautiful dashboard.

Workmanship Warranty

Everything You Need, In One Place

Your Snewroof customer portal keeps you informed at every step of your roofing project.

📅

Book Inspections

Schedule free roof inspections online. Pick your preferred date and get a confirmation instantly.

📋

Review Quotes

Get detailed, itemized quotes delivered directly to your dashboard. Compare and approve with one click.

🏗️

Track Projects

Real-time project status updates so you always know exactly where your roofing job stands.

📄

Manage Documents

Access inspection reports, warranties, permits, and site photos — all stored securely in your lounge.

💬

Direct Messaging

Communicate directly with your project team without phone tag. Message history is preserved forever.

💰

View Invoices

Download invoices, track payment status, and keep your roofing records organized for tax time.

How It Works

Getting started with your Snewroof portal takes less than 2 minutes.

1️⃣

Receive Invite

Your Snewroof rep sends you a portal login after your first contact.

2️⃣

Sign In

Log in to your dedicated customer dashboard with the credentials provided.

✅

Stay Informed

Track every step — from inspection to final sign-off — all in one dashboard.

Ready to Access Your Portal?

Your roofing project dashboard is waiting. Log in with the credentials your Snewroof representative provided.

Log In to Portal

New customer? Contact us at contact@snewroof.com
